headline: What Makes EQT Corporation (EQT) One of the Best AI Energy Stocks to Buy in 2026?
summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) features in our list of the best AI energy stocks to buy in 2026. As of April 9, 2026, analyst sentiment around EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) remains bullish, with 69% of the covering analysts maintaining “Buy” ratings on the stock. Meanwhile, the consensus price target of $70.00 implies an upside potential of 16.32%. […]

headline: EQT Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend on its common stock of $0.165 per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 6, 2026.

headline: Is EQT (OM:EQT) Still Attractive After Mixed Recent Share Performance?
summary: If you are wondering whether EQT is priced attractively or looking stretched at current levels, the next sections will walk through what the numbers are actually saying about the stock. The share price last closed at SEK 296.20, with returns of 3.3% over 7 days, 6.1% over 30 days, 14.6% over 1 year, 48.1% over 3 years and 5.2% over 5 years. The year to date return sits at a 17.3% decline. Recent coverage around EQT has focused on how the stock has been repriced over different time frames,...

headline: EQT Highlights AI Value Creation And Leadership Shift For Future Growth
summary: EQT (OM:EQT) announced a Value Creation Day focused on its AI investment strategy and portfolio usage. The event will highlight how EQT applies artificial intelligence to support value creation across its holdings. EQT also nominated Jean Eric Salata as the next Chairperson of the Board, signaling an upcoming leadership change. EQT (OM:EQT) is a global investment firm with a broad private markets focus, where data and technology are increasingly central to how value is created. Across...
